title: medusantha martiusii
side_effects: Medusantha martiusii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing dizziness and nausea in individuals who consume its extracts without proper guidance. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's compounds can lead to liver damage and kidney strain. In rare cases, improper use of Medusantha martiusii can cause allergic reactions, including skin rashes and respiratory issues. Furthermore, its improper use can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating health conditions and compromising overall well-being.
